title: Adler Roty

{{Quote|The Facinorous, Moliminous, Nefandous, Numamorous Adler Roty|A section of Roty's advertisement|<ref name="Adler Ad">{{HoloNetNewsAd|url=meta/img/ads/600_3.gif|text=Adler Roty}}</ref>}}
'''Adler Roty''' was a professional [[Magic/Legends|magician]] who claimed to be one of the [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerers of Tund]],<ref name="TCSWE" /><ref name="Adler Ad" /> an ancient sect of [[Sith sorcerer|Sith mages]].<ref name="Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu">''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]''</ref> In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Roty's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], the magician started a new show at the [[CoCo District Theatre]] , shortly before the onset of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Roty advertised it in [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] into [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], using a trademarked tag-line, "It's not [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]! It's magic!," and claiming to be an influential, unspeakably wicked person who loved [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Adler Ad" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:AdlerRotyAd-HoloNetNewsVol531-45.png|thumb|right|100px|Adler Roty's advert in the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]]]
Adler Roty's advertisement appeared in [[HoloNet News (original website)|Holonet News]], an [[in-universe]] website created in [[2002]] to publicize the then-upcoming {{Film|II}} film.<ref name="Adler Ad" /> [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] wrote the site content.<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>

The word ''numamorous'' that appears in the spot is a misspelling of the word ''nummamorous'', meaning a person who loves money.<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.allhotelscalifornia.com/kokogiakcom/logolepsy/ow_n.html#nummamorous|text=Luciferous Logolepsy - N|work=KOKOGIAK|archivedate=20180619073011}}</ref>
